chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Ist Appeal No. D – 39 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 19.12.2023 Mr. Asadullah Soomro, Advocate for appellants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
